query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_contas FROM contasTasy WHERE importacaoId = 150003; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_itens FROM itensContaTasy WHERE contaTasyId IN (SELECT id FROM contasTasy WHERE importacaoId = 150003)
